option.name: text
option.value:
PROJECT: NoonAutomation - Noon.com Egypt E-Commerce Selenium Test Automation
=== ARCHITECTURE & FRAMEWORKS === - Framework: Cucumber (Gherkin) + TestNG + Selenium WebDriver - Design Pattern: Page Object Model (POM) - Reporting: Allure - IDE: IntelliJ IDEA - Test Execution: Right-click runner classes (NOT Maven CLI) - Target Site: https://www.noon.com/egypt-ar/
=== PROJECT STRUCTURE === Root Package: NoonAutomation - com.noon (Page Objects) ├── BasePage.java (parent class with WebDriverWait, findElement()) ├── HomePage.java (electronics category click) └── ElectronicsPage.java (brand, sort, price filter actions)
- Cucumber.Drivers └── WebDriverFactory.java (Chrome driver instantiation)
- Cucumber.Reuse ├── BaseTest.java (shared static fields: homePage, electronicsPage, softAssert) ├── Hooks.java (@Before/@AfterStep setup/teardown, static driver)
- Cucumber.HomePage ├── HomePageStepDif.java (step definitions for home/category scenarios) └── HomePageRunner.java (@CucumberOptions runner pointing to .feature files)
=== KEY PATTERNS & PRINCIPLES ===
1. **Gherkin Syntax Strictness** - Format: "Scenario:" (no space before colon) - Indentation and spacing matter; even a single space breaks parsing - Always validate feature file syntax after creation/edits
2. **Cucumber Instantiation Model** - Step definition classes (HomePageStepDif, Hooks) are instantiated SEPARATELY by Cucumber - Shared state MUST be static (e.g., homePage, electronicsPage, softAssert) - Instance fields will NOT persist across steps → NullPointerException risk
3. **Page Object Model** - All locators are private final By fields - Public methods represent user actions (clickOnElectronics(), setMaxPrice(), etc.) - BasePage.findElement() uses WebDriverWait with 10-second timeout - Return new page objects when navigating (e.g., clickOnElectronicsCategory() returns ElectronicsPage)
4. **Test Data & DDT (Data-Driven Testing)** - Use Scenario Outline + Examples tables in .feature files - Support multiple formats: CSV, JSON, Excel, Properties, TestNG DataProvider - Each scenario should have parameterized Examples section
=== CURRENT STATE & NEXT STEPS ===
**Completed:** - Fixed "Scenario :" formatting bug (was causing 0 tests run) - Fixed NullPointerException by making softAssert static in BaseTest.java
**In Progress:** - Feature file restructuring: consolidate granular per-action features into 4 main scenario files: 1. Browse_and_Filter_Products.feature 2. Add_Multiple_Products_to_Cart.feature 3. Guest_Checkout_Flow.feature 4. Search_Validation_Invalid_Input.feature - Each feature should use Scenario Outline with Examples tables for DDT support
**Next Actions:** - Consolidate existing feature files into above 4 scenarios - Implement Examples tables for each scenario outline - Add new page object methods as needed for cart & checkout flows - Implement data-driven test execution
=== CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS === - No spaces around colons in Gherkin keywords (Scenario:, Given:, When:, Then:) - All shared state across steps MUST be static - Tests run via IntelliJ right-click → Run, not Maven - Wait times: 10-second default in BasePage (can override if needed) - Use softAssert for non-critical validations, assertAll() at step end
=== CODE QUALITY GUIDELINES === - Page object locators: private final By - Methods: clear, single-action, descriptive names (clickOnElectronicsCategory, setMaxPrice) - Step definitions: map 1:1 to Gherkin steps, minimal logic - No hardcoded waits; always use WebDriverWait with ExpectedConditions - Driver initialization: WebDriverFactory.getDriver("chrome") in Hooks.setup()
=== ASSISTANCE SCOPE === When helping with this project, prioritize: 1. Page object creation for new features 2. Step definition implementation following existing patterns 3. Feature file structure (Scenario Outline + Examples) 4. Debugging Cucumber/Gherkin parsing issues 5. Locator strategies for Noon.com Egypt site 6. Data-driven test implementation advice 7. SoftAssert usage and assertion patterns 8. Static vs. instance field decisions in test classes
When suggesting code, ensure it: - Follows POM pattern strictly - Uses static fields for shared state - Includes proper WebDriverWait usage - Maintains clean Gherkin syntax in feature files
